role_title: Growth Merchant Lead - Emerging Markets Nashville

location.office_time_required: 70%+ time in field traveling, some time working remotely

level_signals: 4+ years of in-person, outside B2B sales experience required
Expected to operate autonomously and create playbooks independently
Reports to a Regional Sales Manager

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 4+ years of in-person, outside B2B sales experience (field experience is required)
must_haves.qualifier: in-person, outside B2B; field experience required

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have proven success running short, high-velocity, full sales cycles – including same-day closes.
You have strong prospecting, hunting, and negotiation skills.
You are energized by extensive travel – spending 70%+ of your time in the field, including overnight travel inside and outside of your home state.
You are entrepreneurial, adaptable, and motivated building and scaling new markets.
You have demonstrated success operating autonomously and thrive in environments where you will create the playbook, not follow one.
You are comfortable using Salesforce, Google Workspace, and sales productivity tools.
You will need to live by or in proximity to a major airport.

scope.surface: Emerging Markets (T4–T5 geographies) — new restaurant and retailer partnerships in underdeveloped, high-opportunity markets
scope.business_model: marketplace / platform (B2B merchant acquisition, revenue-share agreements)
primary_metrics_inferred: Number of new merchant partnerships closed
core_responsibilities: Expand DoorDash's presence by traveling to emerging markets and developing new restaurant partnerships.
Lead end-to-end, in-person sales cycles– prospecting, pitching, negotiating, and closing.
Sell business owners on DoorDash's value and secure revenue-share agreements.
Consistently execute high-volume field activity and close deals within days.
Build scalable approaches and playbooks to accelerate market expansion.
Shape DoorDash's expansion strategy in rural economies.
Have an outsized impact on growth in high-priority markets.

green_flags: Clearly defined role scope with quantified travel expectation (70%+)
Explicit reporting structure stated (Regional Sales Manager)
High-priority strategic initiative — over 40% of remaining restaurant opportunities per JD
Applications accepted on ongoing basis, suggesting active hiring pipeline
Described career development culture with direct access to support and resources
red_flags: 70%+ travel including overnight stays is a significant lifestyle constraint
Role is labeled 'hybrid' in structure but is effectively a full-time field role with minimal remote work

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 4+ years requirement and autonomy signals; not explicitly stated)
scope.business_model (inferred from platform description and revenue-share language)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
location.type set to 'hybrid' — role is predominantly field-based with some remote work; not a traditional hybrid
ambiguities: Location type: The JD describes a field sales role with 70%+ travel and 'some time working remotely' — this is not a conventional hybrid arrangement. Classified as 'hybrid' as the closest available enum, but the role is effectively a field/traveling role.
Visa sponsorship: Not mentioned anywhere in the JD. Classified as 'unclear'.

Nice-to-haves: The JD contains no explicit 'preferred' or 'bonus' qualifications section; all qualifications listed under 'We're excited about you because…' were treated as must-haves given the unconditional bullet framing.
